heading: Endpoints
body:
To return the details of the AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoint you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints aws describe <privateEndpointId> [options]

```

To list all AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoints in a project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints aws list [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas privateEndpoints aws describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-aws-describe) and [atlas privateEndpoints aws list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-aws-list).
